name: Korean BBQ
description: Grilled meat and vegetable dishes served with traditional Korean sides and sauces.

items.name: GALBI ROS GUI
items.description: Slices of Argentinian entrecôte served with spring onion salad, lettuce, ssamjang-paste, and sesame oil.

items.name: SO BULGOGI
items.description: Specially marinated finely sliced beef with glass noodles.

items.name: DAEJI BULGOGI
items.description: Spicy marinated fine cuts of pork and fresh vegetables. Cheese topping available for an additional 3,00.

items.name: DAK BULGOGI
items.description: Chicken marinated in a soy-ginger sauce with fresh vegetables and ddeok (Korean rice cake).

items.name: DAK GALBI
items.description: Spicy marinated chicken with fresh vegetables & ddeok (Korean rice cake). Cheese topping available for an additional 3,00.

items.name: SAMGYOPSAL GUI
items.description: Pork belly slices served with spring onion salad, lettuce, ssamjang-paste, and sesame oil.

items.name: BUL NAK
items.description: Spicy marinated baby octopus with finely sliced beef and glass noodles.

items.name: YACHAE GUI
items.description: Spicy marinated seitan with fresh vegetables & tofu.
